items.label: Invalid / unknown
items.description: Reserved sentinel: tooling replaces LLM outputs that are not valid positioning_tag ids so ingest can continue.

items.label: STEM-adjacent
items.description: Emphasizes work adjacent to engineering, computing, or sciences.

items.description: Emphasizes work adjacent to the fine arts.

items.label: Professional
items.description: Emphasizes industry readiness, studios, and professional skills.

items.description: Emphasizes academic research trajectories and scholarly output.

items.label: Social Impact
items.description: Emphasizes public interest, equity, sustainability, or civic contexts.

items.label: Physical Making
items.description: Emphasizes physical making, fabrication, or production.

items.label: Digital
items.description: Emphasizes digital products, services, platforms, or apps.

items.label: UI/UX
items.description: Emphasizes user interface and user experience design.

items.label: Critial / Speculative Design
items.description: explicitly emphasizes critical or speculative design.
